pr.title: Match, link ithassam & itmasterhandbullet, match some itOctarockstone functions & data
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2117 moved two item translation units, src/melee/it/items/ithassam.c and src/melee/it/items/itmasterhandbullet.c, from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, added several matched Octarock stone functions and item state data, and cleaned up symbols/names around Hassam, Octarock stone, and two camera transform accessors. The decomp.dev report credited +676 bytes matched code, +4028 bytes linked code, +64 bytes matched data, +248 bytes linked data, with 6 new matches including itOctarockstone_UnkMotion0_Coll, itOctarockstone_802E890C, itOctarockstone_802E878C, Octarock stone .data, Master Hand bullet .data, and completion of itHassam_802CE400.
what_changed: Changed configure.py object status for melee/it/items/ithassam.c and melee/it/items/itmasterhandbullet.c from NonMatching to Matching, making both item units link as matched source.

Renamed generic Hassam symbols such as it_802CDBE0, it_802CDC60, it_802CDE1C, it_802CDF28, it_802CE008, and it_802CE400 to itHassam_* names in source, headers, item logic tables, symbols.txt, and scratches.txt.

Completed or improved Hassam matching around itHassam_802CE400 by splitting common state-change setup into inline itHassam_802CE400_sub, using Camera_GetTransformPosition, normalizing a camera-to-item vector, and tightening assignments such as chained zeroing of velocity components.

Reworked itmasterhandbullet.c organization: added ItemStateTable it_803F9388 data, moved/kept small empty callbacks near their use, and retained two similar motion setup functions it_802F0BE8 and it_802F0D2C that set animation state, accessory callback, item variables, facing rotation, and collision setup.

Added matched Octarock stone code/data in itoctarockstone.c: ItemStateTable it_803F8E90, itOctarockstone_802E878C setup, simple Logic4 hit callbacks, reflected and shield-bounce handlers, itOctarockstone_UnkMotion0_Coll, itOctarockstone_802E890C, and itOctarockstone_802E89B0.
Renamed Octarock stone exports and item logic table callbacks from generic it_802E* / it_2725_Logic4_* names to itOctarockstone_* names across itoctarockstone.h, it_2725.c, and symbols.txt.
Renamed camera accessors Camera_80030788 and Camera_800307AC to Camera_GetTransformPosition and Camera_GetTransformInterest in camera.c, camera.h, symbols.txt, and at least one item call site.

Adjusted local data symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from global-looking it_803B8760, it_804D5600, it_804DD3E0, etc. to local @number labels where the diff indicated local rodata/data/sdata/sdata2 objects.
smart_moves: Used descriptive module-prefixed names while retaining addresses for unknown functions, e.g. itHassam_802CE400 and itOctarockstone_802E890C, which improves searchability without inventing behavior-heavy names.
Promoted two tiny camera functions from address names to semantic names based directly on their bodies: one copies cm_80452C68.transform.position and the other copies cm_80452C68.transform.interest.

Kept matching-sensitive structure in Hassam by introducing an inline helper for the repeated Item_80268E5C / hitlag callback / dynamic bone update sequence rather than duplicating or over-abstracting behavior.

Matched Octarock collision flow with existing item helpers: it_8026DAA8 collision mask check, it_8027781C impact handling, it_802762B0 for one collision bit, then transition through itOctarockstone_802E890C.
Updated call sites and symbol maps alongside headers, avoiding stale item logic table pointers after renaming item-specific callbacks.
Converted local constant/data labels to @number symbols in config, which better reflects local-scope compiler-emitted data and can help prevent accidental global symbol assumptions.
decomp_lessons: When a whole item TU is ready to link, remember the final step is configure.py: switch Object(NonMatching, path) to Object(Matching, path). Source matching alone is not enough to improve linked code metrics.
For item modules, renaming should be propagated through src/melee/it/it_2725.c logic tables, item headers, symbols.txt, and scratches.txt together; partial renames leave hard-to-search mismatches.
Address-suffixed module names are acceptable intermediate names when behavior is not fully understood; use itHassam_* or itOctarockstone_* instead of broad it_* or unrelated it_2725_* prefixes.
Small empty callbacks may still need exact placement/prototypes for matching and linking; this PR kept empty functions such as it_802F0F04 and it_802F0F08 explicit rather than deleting them.
Inline helpers can be a safe matching tactic for repeated item setup sequences, especially when direct factoring influences register allocation or instruction ordering.
Matching data often includes state tables and local float/string constants, not just functions; keep data label scope accurate in symbols.txt.
naming_conventions: Item-specific unknown functions use the item module prefix plus address, e.g. itHassam_802CDBE0 and itOctarockstone_802E878C.
Item motion callbacks follow the existing pattern it<ItemName>_UnkMotion<N>_Anim, _Phys, and _Coll.

Item logic callbacks can be moved from generic it_2725_Logic4_* names to item-specific names such as itOctarockstone_Logic4_DmgDealt, itOctarockstone_Logic4_Reflected, and itOctarockstone_Logic4_ShieldBounced.
Camera accessors should be named by the field they expose when the body is a simple copy, as in Camera_GetTransformPosition and Camera_GetTransformInterest.
Local data symbols in GALE01 symbols may use @number labels rather than global-looking it_80xxxxxx names when scope is local.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: itHassam_802CE400 matching used an inline subroutine itHassam_802CE400_sub for common animation-state and hitlag setup, then explicit local variable ordering and vector math with Camera_GetTransformPosition.
Hassam code changed vector scaling from repeated assignment expressions to compound multiplies and chained velocity zeroing, likely to influence generated instruction shape while preserving behavior.

itmasterhandlaser.c improved it_802F063C by naming scalar temporaries x0/y0/x1/y1, preserving Vec3 stack layout comments, inlining distance expressions into sqrtf calls, and using pre-decrement for the laser effect timer.

itmasterhandbullet.c matching included moving ItemStateTable data before static prototypes/functions and preserving two near-identical setup routines with quaternion Y rotation set to 1.5707963267948966 * facing_dir.
Octarock stone matching replaced placeholder markers with concrete C implementations using existing item helper calls rather than handwritten assembly in the diff excerpt.
No handwritten asm was visible in the provided diff excerpt.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

Automated decomp.dev report for GALE01 showed matched code 50.38% (+0.02%, +676 bytes), linked code 30.19% (+0.10%, +4028 bytes), matched data 20.47% (+0.01%, +64 bytes), and linked data 28.70% (+0.02%, +248 bytes).
Automated report listed 6 new matches: itOctarockstone_UnkMotion0_Coll, itOctarockstone_802E890C, itOctarockstone_802E878C, itoctarockstone .data, itmasterhandbullet .data, and itHassam_802CE400.
Automated report listed 2 improvements in unmatched functions/data: itmasterhandlaser it_802F063C from 94.82% to 98.33%, and itmasterhandbullet .sdata2 from 60.00% to 90.91%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully match itmasterhandlaser it_802F063C after PR 2117 improved it to 98.33%.
Search for subsequent renames of itHassam_802CDE1C, itHassam_802CDF28, itHassam_802CE008, and itHassam_802CE400 to more semantic names.
Search for later Octarock stone work around it_802E89D0, it_802E8ADC, and it_802E8BCC, which remained generic after the renamed/matched block.
Check whether Camera_GetTransformPosition and Camera_GetTransformInterest gained more call sites or additional documentation in later camera cleanup PRs.
Compare other item PRs that convert NonMatching to Matching in configure.py while also fixing symbols.txt local @ labels.
